title: aira cespitosa var. andraei
intro: Aira cespitosa var. andraei is a rare and lesser-known variety of the tufted hairgrass plant, a type of flowering plant in the grass family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aira cespitosa var. andraei include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Aira cespitosa var. andraei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
